sections.paragraph:
ἐπαθροίζω to gather together in addition or besides, increase, pass. in act. sense (Plut., Anton. 936 [44, 1] ἅμα δʼ ἡμέρᾳ πολὺ πλείονας ἐπηθροίζοντο=as soon as it was day they teemed in greatly increased numbers to mount an attack) τῶν ὄχλων ἐπαθροιζομένων when the crowds increased in numbers Lk 11:29.—DELG s.v. ἄθρόος.

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

act. act. = active

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 356
